case_title: GOLDMAN SACHS BANK USA VS. CHRISTOPHER SCOTT ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-03-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210029062) TO PLAINTIFF GOLDMAN SACHS BANK USA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-03-2023 CONTINUED TO JAN-09-2024 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-09-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
